_comment: CANONICAL org ruleset — PRODUCT profile. Applies to the consumer repos (tc-agent-zone, kairix, kata) via an ORGANIZATION ruleset whose conditions.repository_name includes them. WORK PRs (non-control-plane paths) merge on a GREEN gate with NO human approval; only control-weakening paths hold for a humans-only code-owner review (governance/CODEOWNERS, two-tier). See governance/CANONICAL-ORG-RULESET.md for the full spec, the paved-path mapping, and the phased rollout (the required contexts below must be EMITTED by every targeted repo before this ruleset is flipped to active).
_comment_review: required_approving_review_count = 0 (Dan 2026-07-12): lights-out for work. require_code_owner_review = true keeps the CONTROL PLANE HITL. The gate is the only control for work, so 'green' must be trustworthy — keep the required checks deterministic (tc-fitness core:deterministic_tests).
_comment_required_checks: Steady-state required set (Sonar DROPPED per Dan 2026-07-12): 'Quality gate' = the shard-count-independent fan-in check emitted by the shared python-quality-gate.yml caller (the 80% new_code_coverage floor rides inside it); 'require-work-item' = tc-pipelines require-work-item.yml (fail-closed, verifies an OPEN Linear issue — required on EVERY PR, bots exempt); 'no-attribution' = tc-pipelines meta-quality-gate.yml leg single-sourced from tc-fitness core:no_llm_attribution. ROLLOUT PREREQUISITE: every targeted repo must emit all three context NAMES (converge the fan-in to 'Quality gate'; wire the require-work-item + no-attribution callers) before this ruleset is activated, else PRs deadlock.
_comment_bypass: bypass_actors EMPTY by design — no actor (incl. App identities) bypasses. enforce_admins:false leaves the owner break-glass (gh pr merge --admin) as the sole logged exception.
name: org-main-product
